title: cat_ears_on_bed
prompts: The subject wearing a tight black spaghetti strap top, very short gym shorts, cat ears, and a golden name necklace with 'Bar' on all fours on a man's dorm bed with the back arched slightly, face close to the surface, shy expression with lips bitten, eyes rolling up to the viewer, head tilted upwards. The setting is a cluttered man's dorm room with a simple mattress, a wooden desk holding a laptop and a few textbooks, and a small LED light strip along the wall, illuminated by harsh phone flash. Composition is a tight medium close-up from a low angle, the subject filling 70% of the frame with the dorm details soft and blurred. Lighting is harsh phone flash creating strong shadows around the silhouette, warm cast with slight blue tint from the flash. Style is low quality smartphone image with visible grain, soft focus, and intentional blurriness in the background, mimicking a casual candid shot.

The subject wearing a tight black spaghetti strap top, very short gym shorts, cat ears, and a golden name necklace with 'Bar' hanging on all fours on a man's dorm bed with the back arched slightly, face close to the surface, shy expression with lips gently bitten, eyes rolling up to the viewer, head tilted upwards. The setting is a man's dorm room with a mattress, a metal chair with a backpack slung over it, and a poster of a vintage car on the wall, illuminated by harsh phone flash. Composition is a tight close-up from a slightly lower low angle, the subject filling 80% of the frame with the chair and poster as soft background. Lighting is harsh phone flash with uneven distribution, creating a warm glow on the shoulders and cool shadows on the legs. Style is low quality smartphone image with noticeable digital noise in shadows, soft focus from low-light processing, and slight compression artifacts.
